{{CargoRelic
|name=Spaceship Model
|class_id=20062
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a spaceship model made of resin. It's rich in details and has photoelectric effects to simulate space flight to the highest extent. Because of the high cost, only a small batch was released worldwide, granting them high collection value!
|fame=14
|art=9
|fth=19
|civ=29
|tech=19
|ss1=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
